title: Is Targa Resources (TRGP) Stock Outpacing Its Oils-Energy Peers This Year?
text: Here is how Targa Resources, Inc. (TRGP) and YPF Sociedad Anonima (YPF) have performed compared to their sector so far this year.

title: Energy Income Weekly: Strong Fundamentals Continue To Drive Equity Outperformance
text: Strong commodity prices caused gathering and processing and royalty trust equities to outperform. Fourth quarter energy sector earnings are coming in strong.

title: Energy Income Weekly: Caught In Macro Trade Crossfire
text: Energy stocks tumbled in a move that was disconnected from long-term commodity fundamentals. E&Ps were hit the hardest, while midstream was spared.

title: 4 Refining & Marketing MLP Stocks Still Showing Potential
text: Despite some concerns, investors could still bet on the Zacks Oil and Gas - Refining & Marketing MLP operators like TRGP, SUN, CLMT and NGL.
